notice.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI chain. Insert one

model.description: The model. Choose from the list, or specify an ID. Learn more.

maxTokensToSample.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

temperature.description: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

topK.description: Used to remove "long tail" low probability responses. Defaults to -1, which disables it.

topP.description: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

thinking.description: Whether to enable thinking mode for the model

thinkingBudget.description: The maximum number of tokens to use for thinking
